pr_text:
## Title: Fix SRS periodicity offset bounds checking in RRC configuration

### Summary
The `configure_periodic_srs` function in the NR RRC configuration module was assigning raw offset values without validating them against the selected periodicity bounds. When offset values exceeded the maximum allowed for a given periodicity (e.g., offset ≥ 4 for sl4 periodicity), invalid configurations could be created, leading to potential CRC computation errors and false positive error detection downstream
